playbook.intent: PM receives a vague top-level OKR (e.g. 'improve user activation') and produces a leaf-level metric tree the team can move weekly, with vanity metrics flagged and ejected. Faion has solo OKR-setting but nothing on cascade mechanics, north-star design, or vanity-vs-actionable distinction.
playbook.scope: PM receives a vague top-level OKR (e.g. 'improve user activation') and produces a leaf-level metric tree the team can move weekly, with vanity metrics flagged and ejected. Faion has solo OKR-setting but nothing on cascade mechanics, north-star design, or vanity-vs-actionable distinction.

success-criteria.criterion: Restated OKR with one verb, population, time window
North-star metric defined and not vanity
Driver layer mathematically composes the north-star
Every leaf has owner + data source

stage.name: Restate the fuzzy OKR
stage.intent: Convert the prose objective into a single measurable outcome.

tasks.task: Write the OKR as a single sentence with a verb + outcome
Identify the population it applies to
Set the time window for measurement

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the OKR has one verb, one population, and one time window.

stage.name: Pick a north-star
stage.intent: Anchor on the one metric that proxies the outcome.

tasks.task: Score each on actionability, proxying power, and gameability

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the chosen metric beats vanity-metric tests (not gameable, moves with effort).

stage.name: Decompose to drivers
stage.intent: Cascade the north-star into driver metrics.

tasks.task: Decompose the north-star into 3-5 driver metrics
Tie each driver to a team or owner
Confirm drivers sum or multiply to the north-star

stage.decision-gate: Advance when drivers mathematically compose the north-star.

stage.name: Drop to leaves
stage.intent: Cascade drivers into weekly-actionable leaf metrics.

tasks.task: For each driver, list 2-4 leaf metrics teams can move weekly
Tag each leaf with the team that owns it
Confirm each leaf has a data source

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every leaf is weekly-actionable and has a data source.

stage.name: Vanity audit
stage.intent: Eject metrics that look good but do not move the business.

tasks.task: Flag any leaf that moves without business outcome

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written vanity audit log with at least one demotion or explicit 'none found' verdict.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content build-a-defensible-kpi-tree-from-a-fuzzy-company-okr --format md, agent: faion get-content build-a-defensible-kpi-tree-from-a-fuzzy-company-okr --format context, json: faion get-content build-a-defensible-kpi-tree-from-a-fuzzy-company-okr --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
